name: vector-db
description: Vector databases for RAG, semantic search, recommendations. Covers Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, Milvus, pgvector, Chroma, LanceDB, Vespa. Includes indexing, filtering, hybrid search, and production patterns.
author: anwar

commands.name: vdb:pinecone
commands.prompt:
Create Pinecone setup with:
- Index: serverless, pod-based, integrated inference
- Metrics: cosine, dotproduct, euclidean
- Namespaces: multi-tenancy, isolation
- Metadata: filtering, hybrid search, sparse-dense
- Upsert: batch, async, streaming
- Query: top-k, filter, namespace, rerank
- Indexing: HNSW, IVF, configuration
- Monitoring: latency, throughput, errors, costs
- Backup: export, import, collections
- Integrations: LangChain, LlamaIndex, Haystack
- Cost optimization: pod sizing, serverless, namespaces

commands.name: vdb:weaviate
commands.prompt:
Create Weaviate deployment with:
- Schema: classes, properties, vectorizer, module config
- Vectorizers: text2vec-openai, text2vec-cohere, text2vec-huggingface, multi2vec, custom
- Hybrid search: BM25 + vector, alpha weighting
- Filters: where, nearText, nearVector, nearObject
- Aggregations: groupBy, count, sum, mean
- Multi-tenancy: tenants, isolation, resource limits
- Replication: shards, replicas, consistency
- Backup: export, import, scheduling
- Modules: generative (OpenAI, Cohere, HuggingFace), reranker
- GraphQL/REST: queries, mutations, subscriptions
- Monitoring: Prometheus, Grafana, traces

commands.name: vdb:qdrant
commands.prompt:
Create Qdrant setup with:
- Collections: vectors, sparse, multi-vector, named
- Distance: cosine, dot, euclid, manhattan
- Indexing: HNSW, quantization (scalar, product, binary)
- Payload: filtering, payload indexes, geo, full-text
- Search: vector, hybrid, recommendation, discover
- Sharding: distributed, replication, consensus
- Snapshots: create, recover, schedule
- Aliases: blue-green, versioning
- Integrations: LangChain, LlamaIndex, FastEmbed, Instructor
- Cloud: Qdrant Cloud, BYOC
- Monitoring: Prometheus, health checks

commands.name: vdb:milvus
commands.prompt:
Create Milvus deployment with:
- Architecture: standalone, cluster, Zilliz Cloud
- Collections: schema, partitions, segments
- Indexes: FLAT, IVF_FLAT, IVF_SQ8, IVF_PQ, HNSW, DISKANN, GPU indexes
- Search: vector, hybrid, filtered, range, iterator
- Scalar filtering: bool, numeric, text, JSON, array
- Multi-vector: dense + sparse, ColBERT, late interaction
- Replication: replica groups, load balancing
- Backup: snapshots, export/import
- Resource groups: isolation, priority
- Integrations: LangChain, LlamaIndex, MilvusDM, Attu
- Monitoring: Prometheus, Grafana, Milvus Insight

commands.name: vdb:pgvector
commands.prompt:
Create pgvector setup with:
- Extension: CREATE EXTENSION vector
- Tables: vector column, dimensions, metadata
- Indexes: HNSW (m, ef_construction), IVFFLAT (lists)
- Search: <-> (L2), <#> (IP), <=> (cosine)
- Filtering: WHERE clauses, composite indexes
- HNSW: build, scan, ef_search tuning
- Partitioning: pg_partman, time-based
- Replication: streaming, logical
- Connection pooling: PgBouncer
- Monitoring: pg_stat_statements, pgvector stats
- Migration: from other vector DBs
- Hybrid: full-text search + vector (tsvector + vector)

commands.name: vdb:rag
commands.prompt:
Create RAG pipeline with:
- Ingestion: PDF, HTML, MD, code, docs → chunking → embeddings
- Chunking: fixed, semantic, recursive, agentic, parent-child
- Embedding: OpenAI, Cohere, Voyage, BGE, E5, custom
- Storage: vector DB + metadata (doc_id, page, source)
- Retrieval: dense, sparse (BM25), hybrid, reranking
- Reranking: Cohere, BGE, CrossEncoder, LLM-based
- Generation: prompt templates, citations, streaming
- Evaluation: RAGAS, TruLens, DeepEval, custom
- Query rewriting: HyDE, step-back, multi-query
- Guardrails: hallucination, PII, toxicity, factuality
- Observability: traces, metrics, costs, latency

arguments.name: vector_db
arguments.description: pinecone, weaviate, qdrant, milvus, pgvector, chroma

arguments.name: embedding
arguments.description: openai, cohere, voyage, bge, e5, instructor

agents.name: vector-engineer
agents.description: Vector database engineer for RAG and search
agents.prompt: You are a vector database engineer. Build production vector search systems with: Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, Milvus, pgvector, Chroma, LanceDB, Vespa. Focus on: index selection, quantization, hybrid search, multi-tenancy, filtering, scaling, cost optimization, RAG patterns. Write production code with monitoring, testing, and documentation.
